description_long: This object is a classic hand grenade with a robust, segmented, oval-shaped metal body, designed for easy gripping and fragmentation. The surface is matte black, featuring distinct horizontal and vertical ridges that provide structural integrity and a secure hold. At the top, there is a cylindrical fuse assembly with a prominent safety lever (spoon) and a circular pull ring, both attached to the fuse mechanism. The safety lever is angular and extends down the side of the grenade, while the pull ring is looped through a pin that secures the lever in place. The overall design is compact and utilitarian, optimized for manual deployment. No visible markings, labels, or digital components are present on the exterior.
description: A matte black, oval-shaped hand grenade with a segmented body, safety lever, and pull ring. The design is compact, robust, and utilitarian.
description_view_0: Front view showing the safety lever prominently on the left side and the pull ring at the top.
description_view_1: Side view with the pull ring and pin assembly clearly visible, and the lever tucked behind the fuse.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the circular pull ring and the full length of the safety lever extending downward.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the safety lever running vertically down the grenade and the pull ring partially visible.
attribute_detonation_mechanism: Detonation is initiated by pulling the ring to remove the safety pin, releasing the lever, which activates the fuse mechanism.
